api: Amazon Ads API (Sponsored Products / Ads API v2), https://advertising-api.amazon.com
scope: Pass B expansion of the practical declarative Amazon Ads v2 entity surface for profiles, Sponsored Products campaigns/ad groups/product ads/keywords/negative keywords, and portfolios. Batch-array mutations and async reporting remain excluded with concrete dialect reasons.

excluded.reason: Amazon Ads v2 campaign create is a batch-array mutation; the current write dialect sends one JSON object per input record and cannot wrap records in the required array without a WriteHook, and no new hook package is allowed in this shard

Amazon Ads v2 campaign update is a batch-array mutation; the current write dialect cannot emit the required array body or model per-element partial success without a WriteHook, and no new hook package is allowed in this shard

Sponsored Brands campaign records use a distinct product-surface shape from the Sponsored Products v2 entity streams; this bundle keeps the existing SP-scoped auth/header contract and does not guess an incompatible schema

Sponsored Display campaign records use a distinct product-surface shape from the Sponsored Products v2 entity streams; this bundle keeps the existing SP-scoped auth/header contract and does not guess an incompatible schema
report creation is an async job workflow requiring POST creation, polling, and report download; conventions require a StreamHook for async report jobs and no new hook package is allowed in this shard
